{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320163337041071AC3693D8C2B175"}"},"total":2136},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7343921066219782974","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看！作者的文笔是很ok的，写出来的文字很大气，题材也很有趣，是同类型书里面称得上顶级的作品，不会让人感觉很尬或者幼稚，不无聊也不水剧情，非常推荐！唯一遗憾的是正在更新不能一口气看完。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709893481,"group_id":"7262262570701032484","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一只喜欢咕咕叫的咕咕精","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0pvq4tGBlJCtPp3/F2DeJZODv1klni74+Sh3zRs/uUG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e6c2ee619d4411885d81a688fac809b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536521&x-signature=ttCVxbio6Pv4djdHkdYajosFIFY%3D","user_id":"2263229302323044","user_name":"唐怀瑟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2263229302323044","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262262570701032484","book_info":{"abstract":"赵鸿穿越到一个【国运擂台】降临的平行世界，人们需要通过关联词来挑选人才卡片培养参加国运擂台。
然而这个世界夏国的历史被人抹去，导致在国运擂台中不断失利，甚至让五亿人挤在原本十分之一的领土上苟活！
在整个夏国已知的卡片关联词中，最强的名为无双上将，使得一手好大斧。
而到了赵鸿挑选卡片的时候，他看向面前的几个关联词却陷入了沉思。
【无双上将】【大明战神】【曹贼】【冬泳健将】【高梁河车神】
直播观众看见赵鸿选项的时候都惊呆了，纷纷劝阻他赶紧选择无双上将。
不过对于第一次出现的大明战神这个称谓更是难以置信，毕竟是被冠以战神这个称号，绝对是他们夏国崛起的希望！
可赵鸿完全不受观众的影响，在一片骂声当中，毅然决然地伸手拿下了写着曹贼二字的人才卡片！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aa6275f50f3bcb0116b0166a693b8ccb","author":"闲逛的花少","author_id":"","book_id":"7262262570701032484","book_name":"华夏历史最弱？我来挑选参战人物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7262264320317194788","read_count":"93488","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3643864"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1252","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,直播,开局,国运,魂穿,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/484d43c424a7ac9631008c9748342809~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179617&x-signature=raADwyszDUAckuM5B9eM0c84MzU%3D","tomato_book_s
